Class DBHelperTest

java.lang.Object
application.JUnitTests.DBHelperTest
public class DBHelperTest extends Object
JUnit tests for verifying database operations related to questions, answers, and clarifications.

Tests cover insertion and search functionality implemented in the DatabaseHelper class, and ensures correct implementation and retrieval of data.

Since:
1.0
See Also:
  • Question
  • Answer
  • Clarification

  • Constructor Details

    • DBHelperTest

      public DBHelperTest()

  • Method Details

    • setup

      @BeforeAll public static void setup() throws SQLException
      Initializes the test database before any tests are run.

      This method connects to the database using DatabaseHelper, clears all existing data from the questions, answers, and clarifications tables to ensure a clean testing state. This method inserts predefined set of six sample Question objects (including one marked as resolved).

      This method also verifies that all six questions were inserted successfully and adds a shutdown hook to close the database connection after the tests finish.

      Throws:
      SQLException
      See Also:
      • DatabaseHelper
      • Question
      • Answer
      • Clarification
      • DatabaseHelper.insertQuestion(Question)

    • testInsertAnswerOnPreLoadedQuestion

      @Test public void testInsertAnswerOnPreLoadedQuestion() throws SQLException
      Inserts an answer into a known question and verifies that it can be retrieved correctly from the database.

      The test confirms that the inserted answer matches by author and content using DatabaseHelper.insertAnswer(Answer) and DatabaseHelper.loadAnswersForQs(int).

      Throws:
      SQLException - if database error occurs.
      See Also:
      • DatabaseHelper.loadAllQs()
      • Answer
      • Question

    • testInsertClarification

      @Test public void testInsertClarification() throws SQLException
      Inserts a clarification into a specific question and verifies it is properly stored in the database.

      Uses DatabaseHelper.insertClarification(Clarification) and DatabaseHelper.loadClarificationsforQ(int) to confirm that the clarification is successfully stored and can be retrieved.

      Throws:
      SQLException - if database error occurs.
      See Also:
      • Clarification
      • DatabaseHelper.searchQuestions(String, String, String)
      • Question

    • testSearchByKeyword

      @Test public void testSearchByKeyword() throws SQLException
      Searches for questions in the database using a keyword and verifies the number of expected results.

      Ensures the searchQuestions method returns questions containing the term 'JUnit'.

      Throws:
      SQLException - if database error occurs.
      See Also:
      • Question
      • DatabaseHelper.searchQuestions(String, String, String)

    • testSearchByAuthor

      @Test public void testSearchByAuthor() throws SQLException
      Searches for questions authored by a specific user and verifies all returned results match the author.

      This test confirms the accuracy of the searchQuestions filter by author.

      Throws:
      SQLException - if database error occurs.
      See Also:
      • Question
      • DatabaseHelper.searchQuestions(String, String, String)

    • testSearchByStatus

      @Test public void testSearchByStatus() throws SQLException
      Searches for questions based on their status of resolved/unresolved and verifies correct classification.

      Confirms that resolved and unresolved questions are correctly filtered and counted.

      Throws:
      SQLException - if database error occurs.
      See Also:
      • Question
      • DatabaseHelper.searchQuestions(String, String, String)
